indication: YERVOY, in combination with nivolumab, is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with microsatellite instability-high (MSI-H) or mismatch repair deficient (dMMR) metastatic colorectal cancer after prior fluoropyrimidine-based therapy in combination with oxaliplatin or irinotecan.
description: Health Canada approved ipilimumab in combination with nivolumab for the treatment of adult patients with MSI-H or dMMR metastatic colorectal cancer after prior fluoropyrimidine-based therapy in combination with oxaliplatin or irinotecan.

document.name: Yervoy (ipilimumab) [product monograph]. HC.
